growth_formal.label: Professional & Formal
growth_formal.subject: Application for Growth Marketing Role at {{company}}
growth_formal.initialMsg:
Dear {{name}},

I am writing to express my interest in the Growth Marketing position at {{company}}. With experience driving full-funnel growth, I am confident in my ability to contribute meaningfully to your team.

Key achievements include:

  • [Your key achievement #1]
  • [Your key achievement #2]
  • [Your key achievement #3]

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience in demand generation, conversion optimisation, and retention marketing can support {{company}}'s growth objectives.

Thank you for considering my application.
growth_formal.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name}},

I wanted to follow up on my email from a few days ago regarding the Growth Marketing opportunity at {{company}}.

I understand you're busy, but I'm genuinely excited about the possibility of contributing to your team.

Would you have 15 minutes this week for a quick conversation?
growth_formal.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name}},

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to send one final follow-up regarding my interest in the Growth Marketing role at {{company}}.

If now isn't the right time, I completely understand. I'd still love to connect on LinkedIn and stay in touch for future opportunities.

growth_friendly.label: Friendly & Conversational
growth_friendly.subject: Passionate About Growth – Would Love to Connect!
growth_friendly.initialMsg:
Hi {{name}},

I came across {{company}} recently and got genuinely excited about what you're building.

A bit about me — I've spent the last few years obsessing over full-funnel growth. From driving organic traffic increases to generating qualified leads, I've had the chance to work across the entire growth spectrum — SEO, paid media, CRO, and retention.

What gets me out of bed? Figuring out what makes users tick, running experiments, and watching the numbers move.

I'd love to learn more about your growth challenges and explore if there's a fit. No pressure — just a conversation!
growth_friendly.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name}},

I wanted to follow up on my email from a few days ago. I'm genuinely excited about what {{company}} is building and would love to chat about growth challenges.

Would you have 15 minutes this week?
growth_friendly.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name}},

I've reached out a couple of times about opportunities at {{company}} and haven't heard back – which is totally fine, I know how busy things get.

I don't want to keep cluttering your inbox, so I'll assume the timing isn't right. If things change in the future, I'd love to hear from you.

Wishing you and the team all the best!
